info.title: Slopcafe (agent-web-host) HTTP API
info.description: Generated from src/contract.ts (Zod). The narrative/behavioral contract lives in docs/http-api.md; this document is the precise shape reference. Some routes (content-negotiated reads, HTML/UI surfaces, the JSON-RPC /mcp door, and OAuth-library endpoints) are only partly modelled here — see their descriptions.

tags.name: Public
tags.description: Unauthenticated landing, health, static, and this spec.

tags.name: Console
tags.description: Operator browser console (HTML, no JS), cookie-session authed; form-field CSRF; POST twins of the JSON admin DELETEs.

tags.name: Admin: Documents
tags.description: Operator document listing, search, and mutators.

get.summary: Public landing page (homepage document, framed shell).

404.description: Opaque 404 if the homepage doc is missing/revoked.

get.summary: Health/smoke check — confirms D1 + R2 bindings and migrations.

200.description: Bindings reachable; exact counts are safe to expose.

get.summary: Toolbar enhancement script for the document shell (progressive enhancement).
This OpenAPI 3.1 document (generated from src/contract.ts).

post.summary: Publish a document (sanitize + store). Agent key required.

parameters.name: X-Doc-Title
parameters.description: Document title. Omit to derive from the first <h1>; empty to re-derive.

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Optional byte-exact integrity check (64-hex, optional `sha256:` prefix) over the raw body.

requestBody.description: Raw document bytes. `text/html` is sanitized; `text/markdown` is parsed then sanitized.

get.summary: Read a document. Content-negotiated on the Authorization header: no header → HTML shell; valid credential (agent key OR operator token) → raw sanitized bytes; bad credential → 401. Private docs 404 to anonymous callers (no existence oracle). The shell branch does NOT honor If-None-Match.

200.description: HTML shell (no auth) or sanitized bytes (agent key or operator token).

401.description: unauthorized (a malformed/invalid credential — not downgraded to the shell).

404.description: HTML 404 card (browser) or plain text (credential present) — same opaque 404 for missing/revoked/private.

put.summary: Update a document (new version). Agent key + If-Match required.

parameters.name: X-Doc-Title
parameters.description: Document title. Omit to derive from the first <h1>; empty to re-derive.

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Optional byte-exact integrity check (64-hex, optional `sha256:` prefix) over the raw body.

requestBody.description: Raw document bytes. `text/html` is sanitized; `text/markdown` is parsed then sanitized.

delete.summary: Revoke (kill) a document + purge R2 bytes. Operator-gated.

200.description: Revoked. A second DELETE on a revoked doc returns 404.

parameters.name: X-CSRF-Token
parameters.description: Required when authed via session cookie.

get.summary: Sanitized HTML bytes (what the sandboxed iframe loads). Honors If-None-Match → 304. Visibility gate: private docs 404 to anonymous callers.

200.description: Sanitized HTML (Markdown docs get a reading-theme prefix). `ETag` set.

304.description: If-None-Match satisfied (checked AFTER the visibility gate — never an oracle).

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Send `"v<n>"`; a match returns a bodyless 304.

get.summary: Markdown derivation of the sanitized HTML, for agents ingesting as context. Requires a credential — an agent key OR operator (token/session); operator ≥ agent. (The MCP `read_document` format:"markdown" twin returns the JSON `ReadTextResponse` envelope; this HTTP route returns raw text/markdown with the metadata in headers.)
The retained, UNSANITIZED source S + advisories re-derived from it (the read before edit_document). Requires a credential — an agent key OR operator (token/session); operator ≥ agent.

200.description: Source returned with an explicit `unsanitized: true` provenance marker.

409.description: source_unavailable (un-backfilled/legacy doc with no retained source).

get.summary: Slug-addressed twin of GET /d/{public_id} — content-negotiated identically (shell vs bytes vs 401), keeping the pretty slug in the address bar (no 302). Retired slugs forward loudly or 410.

200.description: HTML shell (no auth) or sanitized bytes (agent key or operator token).

404.description: HTML 404 (browser) or plain text (credential present) — never-claimed slug, opaque.

409.description: slug_redirected (credentialed caller, retired slug with a redirect, no follow_redirects).

410.description: HTML Gone (browser) or JSON (credentialed caller) — retired slug, no redirect.

parameters.name: follow_redirects
parameters.description: On a retired slug with a redirect target, `true` serves the target instead of 409/410.

get.summary: Markdown derivation by slug (requires a credential — agent key OR operator; operator ≥ agent). Slug-addressed twin of /d/{id}/text.

parameters.name: follow_redirects
parameters.description: On a retired slug with a redirect target, `true` serves the target instead of 409/410.

get.summary: Operator-only: framed shell for historical version n. Non-operator → opaque 404.

200.description: HTML shell with a historical-version banner.

get.summary: Operator-only: sanitized bytes of historical version n. Honors If-None-Match → 304.

200.description: Sanitized HTML of version n. `ETag` set.

get.summary: Operator document-management page (visibility, slug, version history, revoke). Cookie session.

200.description: HTML management page, or a sign-in card when logged out (no DB hit).

post.summary: Operator form: set public/private (no version bump). Auth ladder: operator_token OR cookie+csrf_token.

200.description: Re-rendered manage page (cookie) or result card (bearer).

post.summary: Operator form: add/rename/clear the slug (no version bump; rename auto-forwards).
Operator form: replace a doc's tags (comma-separated `tags` field; full replacement, no version bump).

tags.description: Comma-separated tags ([A-Za-z0-9_-]; invalid chars stripped). Empty clears all.

post.summary: Operator form: set lifecycle status active|deprecated (no version bump). Optional superseded_by pointer.

superseded_by.description: Replacement doc's public_id (deprecated only; empty = none).

post.summary: Operator form: re-publish historical version n as a NEW version (source required).

get.summary: Operator revoke confirmation page. Session-aware (CSRF form vs token field). Opaque 404.

post.summary: Operator form: revoke + purge. Returns terminal HTML (never a 302).

get.summary: Operator browser sign-in form.

post.summary: Validate operator token (constant-time) → set signed session + CSRF cookies → 302 to next.

302.description: Redirect to `next` with Set-Cookie: session + CSRF.

get.summary: Logout confirmation page (confirm-before-logout).

post.summary: Clear session + CSRF cookies. CSRF-checked.

get.summary: OAuth consent UI (Door A). Session-aware: operators see inline repair cards (TOFU callback, bind-or-mint, login link); non-operators see a generic consent/error card.

post.summary: Operator consent decision (allow/deny/allow_callback). Binds unbound clients at consent.
OAuth token endpoint — served by @cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider. Standard OAuth 2.1.

200.description: Standard OAuth 2.1 token response (access_token, token_type, expires_in, …).

post.summary: Dynamic Client Registration (optional, ENABLE_DCR) — served by the OAuth provider library.

get.summary: OAuth 2.1 authorization-server discovery metadata (OAuth provider library).
OAuth protected-resource metadata (OAuth provider library).

post.summary: Streamable-HTTP MCP transport (JSON-RPC 2.0, NOT REST). Agent-authed via Door A (OAuth token) or Door B (awh_ bearer). Tools: publish_document, update_document, edit_document, read_document, list_documents, search_documents, load_context_pack, create_publish_credential. The request/response bodies are JSON-RPC envelopes (optionally an SSE stream), not schema-validated here — see docs/http-api.md.

200.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 response (may be a Server-Sent-Events stream).

401.description: Rejected by the OAuth provider before reaching the handler.

get.summary: Bare /admin → 302 to the console dashboard.
Console dashboard — fleet counts + storage-used bar. Sign-in card when logged out.

200.description: HTML dashboard, or a sign-in card when logged out (no DB hit).

get.summary: Agents table + a mint-agent form. Sign-in card when logged out.

200.description: HTML agents page, or a sign-in card when logged out.

post.summary: Mint an agent + its initial key (form). Plaintext key shown once on a secret card.

200.description: HTML secret card (key shown once) or an error card.

get.summary: Agent detail — keys, OAuth clients, and a danger zone (revoke). Sign-in card when logged out.

200.description: HTML agent-detail page, or a sign-in card when logged out.

post.summary: Mint an additional key for an agent (rotation, form). Plaintext key shown once.

200.description: HTML secret card or error card.

post.summary: Mint an OAuth client bound to this agent (form). Secret shown once on a secret card.

200.description: HTML secret card or error card.

post.summary: Cascading agent kill (form; agent_id field). POST twin of DELETE /admin/agents/{id}.

200.description: Re-rendered agents list, or an error card.

post.summary: Revoke a single key (form; key_id field). POST twin of DELETE /admin/keys/{id}.

200.description: Re-rendered agent detail, or an error card.

post.summary: Mint an UNBOUND OAuth client (form; agent chosen at /authorize). Secret shown once.

200.description: HTML secret card or error card.

post.summary: Cascading OAuth-client revoke (form; client_id field). POST twin of DELETE /admin/oauth-clients/{id}.

200.description: Re-rendered page, or an error card.

get.summary: Documents page — newest-first list (cursor-paginated) or hybrid search when ?q= is set, with tag/slug filters and a Public/Private badge per row. Sign-in card when logged out.

200.description: HTML documents page, or a sign-in card when logged out.

422.description: HTML notice card (search query had no usable terms — bad_query).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Hybrid search query (when set, switches from list to search mode; not paginated).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior page's `next_cursor`.

get.summary: Maintenance page — the Vectorize backfill form. Sign-in card when logged out.

200.description: HTML maintenance page, or a sign-in card when logged out.

post.summary: Run one Vectorize backfill page (form; mode field). Notice + a continue button while more remain.

200.description: HTML notice card (one page processed; continue button while next_cursor is non-null).

get.summary: List agents (created_at DESC, id DESC). Cursor-paginated.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior page's `next_cursor`.

post.summary: Mint an agent + its initial key (one transaction). Plaintext key shown once.

get.summary: List keys for an agent. Cursor-paginated.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior page's `next_cursor`.

post.summary: Mint an additional key for an agent (rotation). Plaintext key shown once.

delete.summary: Cascading agent kill — revokes all keys + deletes all OAuth clients.
Revoke a single key (rotation). A second DELETE returns 404.

get.summary: List all documents (incl. revoked). Cursor-paginated.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior page's `next_cursor`.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Filter by slug (exact match; 0 or 1 rows).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle status (migration 0014). Omit to include everything — deprecated docs are then included and marked per row. Invalid value → 400 bad_status.

post.summary: Operator authors a new document (JSON body). Authored as the operator principal.

content.description: Document body — HTML or Markdown per `format`.

title.description: Omit to derive from the first <h1>.

get.summary: Hybrid (keyword + semantic) search over live documents. NOT paginated (no next_cursor). With ?include_bodies=true the 200 becomes a CONTEXT PACK (PackResponse): full markdown bodies included best-first under budget_bytes/max_documents, the rest reported in omitted[] (never truncated).

200.description: Hits (possibly empty), relevance-ranked — or, with include_bodies=true, the PackResponse envelope.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query. Keyword leg tokenizes it (words ≥2 chars, trailing * for prefix); semantic leg embeds it raw.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: AND-filter by tag (repeatable). Applies to both legs.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Filter by slug. Applies to both legs.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle status (migration 0014). Omit to include everything — deprecated docs are then included and marked per row. Invalid value → 400 bad_status.

parameters.name: include_bodies
parameters.description: true → return a context pack (PackResponse) instead of bare hits.

parameters.name: budget_bytes
parameters.description: Pack body budget in STORED bytes (default 65536, ~16K tokens; max 262144). Clamped, not rejected.

parameters.name: max_documents
parameters.description: Pack body-count cap (default 8, max 25). Clamped, not rejected.

parameters.name: include_deprecated
parameters.description: true → deprecated docs join the pack fill instead of being omitted-and-reported.

put.summary: Operator updates a document (new version, authored as operator). Optional If-Match.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: OPTIONAL (unlike PUT /d/:id). Send `"v<n>"` or `*`; absent = last-write-wins.

content.description: Document body — HTML or Markdown per `format`.

title.description: Omit to inherit prior; "" re-derives from the first <h1>.

post.summary: Set a live doc public/private (no version bump). Idempotent.
Add/rename/clear a live doc's slug (no version bump; rename auto-forwards).
Set a live doc's lifecycle status (active|deprecated; archived reserved). No version bump. Idempotent.

422.description: bad_target (superseded_by not a live doc / self-pointer)

status.description: "archived" is reserved and rejected in v1.

superseded_by.description: Replacement doc's public_id (deprecated only). Full-replace per call; omitted clears. Must be live, not self.

post.summary: Replace a live doc's tags (full replacement, no version bump). Idempotent.
Backfill / reconcile the Vectorize semantic index. Operator-invoked, resumable.

200.description: One page processed; re-invoke with ?cursor= while next_cursor is non-null.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: missing (default — embed only un-vectorized docs) | rebuild (re-embed every live doc).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Resume cursor from a prior page's next_cursor.

post.summary: Point a retired slug at a live doc (loud redirect).

delete.summary: Drop a retired slug's redirect (back to 410 Gone). Slug stays retired.
Force-release a retired slug (escape hatch — the only un-retire path).

post.summary: Mint an OAuth client bound to an agent (one per agent). Secret shown once.
Mint an UNBOUND OAuth client (agent chosen at /authorize). Secret shown once.

delete.summary: Cascading OAuth-client revoke (invalidates grants + live tokens). Bound or unbound.

ApiKeyBearer.name: Authorization
ApiKeyBearer.description: Bearer token in the Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer awh_<key>` for an agent key, or `Authorization: Bearer <OPERATOR_TOKEN>` for operator-only routes. (OpenAPI models the header mechanism; the two token kinds differ only in which routes accept them.)

OAuthBearer.description: OAuth 2.1 authorization-code + PKCE flow used by the /mcp connector door (Door A).

CookieSession.name: awh_session
CookieSession.description: Operator browser session: the signed `awh_session` cookie. Cookie-authed mutating requests must also send the `X-CSRF-Token` header (value from the readable `awh_csrf` cookie).

status.description: Lifecycle: a deprecated doc still serves/lists/reads but is no longer current.

superseded_by.description: A replacement doc's public_id (deprecated docs only) — prefer it; never auto-followed.

status.description: Lifecycle: a deprecated doc still serves/lists/reads but is no longer current.

superseded_by.description: A replacement doc's public_id (deprecated docs only) — prefer it; never auto-followed.

status.description: Lifecycle: a deprecated doc still serves/lists/reads but is no longer current.

superseded_by.description: A replacement doc's public_id (deprecated docs only) — prefer it; never auto-followed.

status.description: Lifecycle: a deprecated doc still serves/lists/reads but is no longer current.

superseded_by.description: A replacement doc's public_id (deprecated docs only) — prefer it; never auto-followed.

score.description: Bigger = better. Scale differs by mode (fused RRF | negated BM25 | cosine) — comparable only WITHIN one result set.

matched_field.description: Which signal surfaced the hit. title/description/body = keyword (FTS) column; "semantic" = vector-only concept match (a hit matched by both keeps its keyword attribution).

snippet.description: Keyword hit: the matched column with [bracketed] match terms. Semantic hit: the matched passage's excerpt, NOT bracketed (no brackets = concept match, not term match).

modified.description: True = the sanitizer changed your input; check stripped[]/will_not_render[].

will_not_render.description: Survived sanitization but the render CSP will block it — notably external , which would otherwise fail with no other signal.
